completion.provider_specific_retry_deviation: one of 270 planned Kimi calls: the planned call had one SSL EOF attempt and one response that ended at the 8192-token provider cap before forming complete schema-valid JSON; retry cap 8192->16384

variance_decomposition.note: Fast balanced linear method-of-moments decomposition; negative component estimates are truncated at zero. The residual fresh-call component also absorbs omitted replicate interactions; this is not an ordinal cumulative-link model.

method_notes.icc: ICC(A,1), two-way absolute-agreement single-measure formula across fresh repetitions
method_notes.weighted_kappa: quadratic-weighted Cohen kappa, averaged descriptively over the three repetition pairs
method_notes.bootstrap: 2000 fixed-seed draws; both individual-stimulus and 30-concept-cluster intervals reported
method_notes.complete_cells: all provider metrics require all three fresh calls; no imputation
method_notes.panel: fixed nine-judge aggregations require all nine valid judges within every stimulus-repetition cell
